name: sd_c3b_eq_dfirst
drl:
rule "RD"
no-loop
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "RJ"
when
    P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
_finding: GREEN control 3x: deleter decl-first at equal salience batches its whole list and the justifier never fires — exact H-QHEAD prediction, engine==oracle.
